subcodes.first_line: O thou teacher of the children of the kingdom! Thou hast arisen to perform a service which would justly entitle thee to vaunt thyself over all the teachers on earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای معلمه اطفال ملکوت بخدمتی قیام نموده ای که اگر بجمیع معلمین آفاق افتخار کنی
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consultation, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
